svg.title: ZenTalentHub supply-demand matching workflow
svg.desc: End-to-end workflow showing how resumes are fed in, parsed, matched against open SRF positions, and top 5 results displayed

g.text: Match the right skill to the right project, right now

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are resumes fed into ZenTalentHub?')
sendPrompt('How does ZenScan parse resumes in ZenTalentHub?')
sendPrompt('What does the structured employee profile contain?')
sendPrompt('How is the SRF Excel file uploaded?')
sendPrompt('What does the SRF parser extract from Excel?')
sendPrompt('What does the structured SRF record contain?')
sendPrompt('How does Ollama AI do semantic skill matching?')
sendPrompt('How are match scores calculated and ranked?')
sendPrompt('What criteria are used to score a match?')
g.text: Required skills match +10 pts each · Preferred skills +5 · Domain match +15 · Experience met +10 · Certifications +8

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What details are shown on a match card?')
sendPrompt('How is the second best match different from first?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a manager proposes an employee?')
sendPrompt('How does shortlisting work in ZenTalentHub?')
sendPrompt('How do you view full profile from match results?')
sendPrompt('What notification does the employee receive?')
g.text: Teams message to employee · "You have been shortlisted for SRF-2025-001 · View and respond"
Status updated in ZenTalentHub · SRF marked filled or re-matched

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the final outcome of ZenTalentHub matching?')
g.text: Right skill · Right project · Right time — SRF fulfilled faster, talent utilised better
